description_long: A classic hamburger with a thick beef patty is served on a round, seeded bun, accompanied by a generous portion of rustic, hand-cut fries. The bun is golden brown and topped with visible sesame seeds, giving it a textured appearance. Crisp green lettuce and a slice of cheese are layered beneath the patty, with the cheese slightly melted and peeking out from the sides. The fries are irregularly shaped, with golden-brown edges and a rustic, homemade look, arranged next to the burger on a light wooden serving board. The overall presentation is appetizing and typical of a casual dining or street food setting. The surface of the bun and fries appears matte, with a slight sheen from natural oils.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with lettuce, cheese, and a thick beef patty, served with rustic fries on a wooden board. The presentation is appetizing and casual.
description_view_0: The hamburger and fries are both clearly visible, with the lettuce and cheese peeking out from under the patty and the fries spread out on the board.
description_view_1: The fries are more prominent in the foreground, partially obscuring the lower part of the burger, while the top of the bun and sesame seeds are clearly visible.
description_view_2: The burger is shown from the side, highlighting the thickness of the patty and the layering of lettuce and cheese, with the fries to the left.
description_view_3: The top of the bun is most visible, with the patty, lettuce, and cheese seen from above, and only a small portion of fries visible behind the burger.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly beneath the beef patty, with a slice of cheese partially melted and visible under the patty. The toppings are evenly distributed and contained within the bun.
